summary: Iteration 19 - Observer Mode Fallback Screen Flow - All tests PASSED. Backend: 9/9 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 8 features verified working correctly. The new two-screen observer mode correctly shows FALLBACK screen (when browser_open=false) instead of the old observer-active-screen.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session returns autodarts_mode, observer_browser_open, observer_state when locked
Backend: POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/unlock creates session with per_game pricing (credits=3, price_total=6.0)
Backend: GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session after unlock returns board_status=unlocked, autodarts_mode=observer, observer_browser_open=false
Backend: GET /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/overlay returns visible=true, credits_remaining=3 when board is unlocked
Backend: POST /api/boards/BOARD-1/lock locks the board successfully
Backend: GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session after lock returns board_status=locked, session=null
Backend: POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/end-game returns should_lock=false when credits > 0
Backend: POST /api/kiosk/BOARD-1/end-game returns should_lock=true when credits = 0
Frontend: /kiosk/BOARD-1 shows locked-screen when board is locked (data-testid='locked-screen')
Frontend: /kiosk/BOARD-1 shows observer-fallback-screen when board unlocked and observer_browser_open=false
Frontend: observer-fallback-screen shows observer-retry-btn (Autodarts starten button)
Frontend: observer-fallback-screen shows fallback-credits with value 3
Frontend: Clicking 'Session beenden' shows confirmation with 'Abbrechen' and 'Bestaetigen' buttons
Frontend: After end-game with credits remaining, stays on fallback screen with toast 'Noch 3 Spiele uebrig'
seed_data_creation: Board BOARD-1 was unlocked with 3 credits for testing, then locked for final state verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested the new two-screen observer mode flow. Key changes from previous iterations: 1) Old 'observer-active-screen' data-testid is GONE - replaced by two screens: 'observer-handoff-screen' (when browser_open=true) and 'observer-fallback-screen' (when browser_open=false). 2) Since BOARD-1 has no Autodarts URL configured, observer_browser_open is always false, so the FALLBACK screen shows. 3) Fallback screen data-testids: observer-retry-btn, fallback-credits, fallback-call-staff-btn, fallback-end-session-btn, fallback-confirm-end-btn. 4) Handoff screen data-testids: handoff-credits, handoff-call-staff. 5) The old setup-screen should NEVER appear in observer mode (autodarts_mode='observer'). 6) GET /api/boards/BOARD-1/session returns: board_status, autodarts_mode, observer_browser_open, observer_state, session. 7) observer_state can be: closed, idle, in_game, finished, unknown, error.

ObserverActiveScreen_two_modes.HANDOFF: Shows when observerBrowserOpen=true - minimal dark backdrop, testid='observer-handoff-screen'
ObserverActiveScreen_two_modes.FALLBACK: Shows when observerBrowserOpen=false - error state with retry/end buttons, testid='observer-fallback-screen'
